tools.name: chess_list_variants
tools.description: List all available chess variants with their descriptions, board sizes, and rules.

tools.name: chess_get_legal_moves
tools.description: Get all legal moves for the current position. Returns moves in algebraic notation with annotations (capture, promotion, castling, etc).

tools.name: chess_analyze_position
tools.description: Evaluate a chess position using the engine. Returns a score (centipawns from the side to move), best move, and the principal variation.

tools.name: chess_validate_move
tools.description: Check whether a specific move is legal in the current position. Returns legal/illegal with explanation.

tools.name: chess_make_moves
tools.description: Play a sequence of moves from a position and return the resulting FEN, game status, and move list.

tools.name: chess_get_opening_book
tools.description: Look up opening book moves for a position. Returns known good continuations from the variant opening book.

tools.name: chess_render_svg
tools.description: Render a board position as a self-contained SVG string. No DOM or browser APIs required. Works in Cloudflare Workers.

tools.name: chess_generate_puzzle
tools.description: Serve a random chess puzzle from a pool of 1,557 pre-generated puzzles across 66 variants (plus standard). Returns position, solution, metadata, and an SVG board image. Use chess_list_puzzle_types to discover available variant:type combinations.

tools.name: hex_list_games
tools.description: List all available hex map games with their map types, layouts, sizes, and style options.

tools.name: hex_generate_map
tools.description: Generate a hex map for a given game. Returns the full hex grid with terrain types, coordinates, and metadata.

tools.name: hex_get_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific hex coordinate on a generated map: terrain type, neighbors, and distances to other hexes.

tools.name: hex_compute_fov
tools.description: Compute field-of-view from a hex position: all hexes visible within a given range, respecting line-of-sight through the grid.

tools.name: hex_export_svg
tools.description: Export a generated hex map as an SVG string for rendering or embedding.

tools.name: hex_pathfind
tools.description: Find the shortest path between two hexes on a generated map using breadth-first search. Optionally specify impassable terrain types.

tools.name: rules_list_games
tools.description: List all game families in the Moddable Games rules library. Returns titles, player counts, variant counts, and URLs.

tools.name: rules_get_game
tools.description: Get full metadata and variant list for a specific game family. Returns players, duration, tagline, variant names, and rules URL.

tools.name: rules_get_variant
tools.description: Get rules content for a specific variant within a game family. Returns headings, rules text, and direct URL.

tools.name: rules_search
tools.description: Search the entire rules library by keyword. Returns matching entries ranked by relevance across all games and variants.

tools.name: rules_random
tools.description: Pick a random game or variant from the library. Optionally constrain to a specific game family for a random variant within it.

tools.name: ti4_draw_objectives
tools.description: Draw random public objectives for a Twilight Imperium 4e game round. Supports expansion filtering.

tools.name: ti4_draw_agendas
tools.description: Draw random agenda cards for a Twilight Imperium 4e agenda phase. Returns for/against text.

tools.name: ti4_draft_factions
tools.description: Run a Milty-style faction draft: deal N factions per player to choose from. Supports ban lists.

tools.name: nukes_setup_generator
tools.description: Generate random starting positions for a Nukes game. Assigns territories to players on a generated hex map.

tools.name: colony_dice_odds
tools.description: Calculate probability of each resource number being rolled on 2d6. Returns the odds table and expected output for a given board position.

tools.name: mancala_simulate_move
tools.description: Simulate a mancala move: sow seeds from a pit and return the resulting board state. Supports Oware and Kalah rules.

tools.name: mancala_legal_moves
tools.description: List legal moves for the current player in a mancala position.

tools.name: morris_legal_moves
tools.description: List legal moves in a Nine Men's Morris position. Handles placement, sliding, and flying phases.

tools.name: morris_detect_mill
tools.description: Check if a placement/move forms a mill (three in a row) in Nine Men's Morris.

tools.name: ur_roll_dice
tools.description: Roll the four tetrahedral dice for the Royal Game of Ur. Each die has 2 marked corners (50% chance). Sum is 0-4.

tools.name: ur_legal_moves
tools.description: List legal moves for a Royal Game of Ur position given a dice roll.

tools.name: pachisi_roll_cowries
tools.description: Roll cowrie shells for Pachisi/Chaupar. 6 shells, count faces up. Special values: 0 faces = 25 (grace), 1 face = 10 (grace).

tools.name: piece_gallery_search
tools.description: Search and filter piece sets from the Moddable Chess piece gallery (96 sets, 2,550 SVGs across 19 game families). Filter by family, license, author, or search by name. Returns metadata for matching sets with preview URLs.

tools.name: piece_gallery_get_set
tools.description: Get full details for a specific piece set including manifest, piece file list, direct SVG URLs, and a preview image URL. Use piece_gallery_search to find set IDs first.

tools.name: piece_gallery_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate statistics for the piece gallery: total sets, SVG count, breakdown by family, license distribution, author list, and playable/recolorable counts.

tools.name: chess_list_puzzle_types
tools.description: List all available puzzle types in the pool with counts. Returns variant:type keys, total puzzles per key, and rating ranges. Use this to discover what puzzles are available before calling chess_generate_puzzle.

tools.name: dice_roll
tools.description: Roll dice using standard notation (e.g. "2d6+3", "4d8-1", "d20"). Supports any combination of dice, modifiers, and multiple pools.

tools.name: ti4_random_factions
tools.description: Generate random faction assignments for a Twilight Imperium 4e game. Supports base game and Prophecy of Kings expansion.

tools.name: coin_flip
tools.description: Flip a coin or pick randomly from a list of options. Use for quick binary decisions or random selection.

tools.name: team_split
tools.description: Randomly split a list of players into balanced teams. Handles odd numbers gracefully.

tools.name: jam_status
tools.description: Get the current Mod Jam status: active/inactive, theme, base game, time remaining, and submission count.

tools.name: jam_timer
tools.description: Get the countdown timer for the current Mod Jam phase (voting, building, or judging).

tools.name: jam_vote
tools.description: Get current vote standings for the active Mod Jam vote. Returns anonymised tallies per option.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "chess_list_puzzle_types" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: List all available puzzle types in the pool with counts. Returns variant:type keys, total puzzles per key, and rating ranges. Use this to discover what puzzles …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
